titlestmt.titleproper: Francis C. Moon Reuleaux reference collection6960
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Hilary Dorsch Wong

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-03-28 23:25:02 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Francis C. Moon Reuleaux reference collection
did.abstract: Papers regarding German engineer Franz Reuleaux and the collection of his kinematic models housed at Cornell University. Papers were assembled by Cornell Professor of Engineering Frank Moon during the late 1990's and early 2000's, particularly during research trips to Germany. They include Moon's research notes on Reuleaux and Reuleaux's influence, biography and genealogy; photocopies and transcriptions of letters, essays and drawings created by Reuleaux; Moon's academic papers and professional work on Reuleaux; and research on Cornell's kinematic model collection and other kinematic models. Papers also include material on specific projects, such as the permanent exhibit of Reuleaux's kinematic models at Cornell, and the Kinematic Models for Design Digital Library (KMODDL), an online collection of digitized images and information on kinematics.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Francis Charles Moon is the Joseph C. Ford Professor of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering at Cornell University.

Franz Reuleaux (1829-1905), a German engineer of Belgian heritage, was an influential figure in machine design and kinematics, or the science of movement. He was known for designing more than 800 teaching models to demonstrate kinematic principles. He contributed to the development of engineering as a professional science, integrating mathematical and scientific principles into engineering design. Born in Eschweiler in Prussia, he studied under Ferdinand Redtenbacher at Karlsruhe, and also studied in Berlin and Bonn. After teaching in Zurich at the Polytechnic School, he taught at what became the Koenigs Technischen Hochschule in Berlin-Charlottenburg Berlin for many years, becoming its rector in 1890. As a prominent engineer, he was a German ambassador at international exhibitions and expositions, including the Philadelphia Centennial Exhibition in 1876 and the Vienna Exhibition in 1873.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers regarding German engineer Franz Reuleaux and the collection of his kinematic models housed at Cornell University. Papers were assembled by Cornell Professor of Engineering Frank Moon during the late 1990's and early 2000's, particularly during research trips to Germany. They include Moon's research notes on Reuleaux and Reuleaux's influence, biography and genealogy; photocopies and transcriptions of letters, essays and drawings created by Reuleaux; Moon's academic papers and professional work on Reuleaux; and research on Cornell's kinematic model collection and other kinematic models. Papers also include material on specific projects, such as the permanent exhibit of Reuleaux's kinematic models at Cornell, and the Kinematic Models for Design Digital Library (KMODDL), an online collection of digitized images and information on kinematics.

emph.ref: Series III. Moon's papers and professional work

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Francis Charles Moon Reuleaux reference collection, #6960. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Moon, F.C. The Machines of Leonardo da Vinci and Franz Reuleaux : Kinematics of Machines from the Renaissance to the 20th century. Dordrecht, The Netherlands : Springer, 2007.
"The Reuleaux Collection of Kinematic Mechanisms at Cornell University": http://sections.asme.org/southerntier/pdf/Reuleaux.pdf
Cornell Kinematic Mechanisms images have been digitized and are accessible through the RMC image portal..

controlaccess.geogname: Sibley College of Mechanical Engineering and Mechanic Arts
controlaccess.subject: Cornell University
Centennial Exhibition (1876 : Philadelphia, Pa.)
Science -- Study and teaching -- Digital libraries
Exhibitions.
Machine design -- History.
Machinery, Kinematics of
Machinery -- Models.
Kinematics.
Mechanical engineering -- History.
Mechanical engineering.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Funded by the Humboldt Foundation and others, Moon researched Reuleaux at archives such as the Deutsches Museum in Munich. This series includes Moon's notes and correspondence, photocopies of original documents, and secondary source material. For material relating to Moon's research on models, please see Series 2.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon's correspondence with other Reuleaux specialists. Includes a few photocopies of older Reuleaux material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence on Reuleaux, photocopy from a biography.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon's correspondence with Germans and German institutions, seeking info on Reuleaux and his models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, application, paperwork etc. for the Humboldt Stiftung

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied bio of Thurston, and a photocopied Thurston report from the Vienna exhibition (1873).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of a book: "The Kinematics of machinery. Two lectures. Relating to Reuleaux Methods..." By Alex B.W. Kennedy, C.E. W/ intro by R.H. Thurston. Reprinted from van Nostrand's magazine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy: Deutsches Museum Vortraege und Berichte. "Naturforschung u. Technik." Vortrag gehalten im Deutschen Muesum am 29. Oktober 1910 von Dr. Otto Thilo.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Spamer, Otto. *Buch der Erfindungen. Gewerbe und Industrien.* Note on it says it's 1883-1891. Also says "zweite Subskription" (printed) and a note NL069/231.Chapter on clock manufacture "Die Uhrenfabrikation" (269-287)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Excerpts from magazines regarding Reuleaux and the Engineering Congress in Chicago.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy. K. Mauersberer. "Franz Reuleeaux (1829-1905)". In Banse, G. Wollgast, S. (Hrsg.): *Biografien bedeutender Techniker. Volk und Wissen* Volkseigener Verlag, Berlin 1983, 184-192.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of materials re the Sydney and Melbourne Exhibitions. Includes certificates and letters. Some of it seems to be from the Reichskanzleramt

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Images of machines and mechanisms

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: letter about photocopying mistake

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Article about Reuleaux "adversary" Alois Riedler in German, by Karl-Heinz Manegold.

did.unittitle: Thurston: "The Needs and Opportunities of a Great Technical College"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied article, originally in *Scientific American Supplement* No 913. This is a reprint.

did.unittitle: Thurston: "On the Necessity of a Mechanical Laboratory; its province and its methods"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied article. "A paper read before the American Railway Master Mechanics' Association. Reprinted from the Journal of the Franklin Institute, December 1875." Philadelphia: WM P. Kildrake, printer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of the H. Wedding article: "Vortrag gehalten im Verein zur Befoerderung des GewerbfleiBes" Berlin: Leonhard Simion, 1905.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A photocopy of the title page for Principien der Mechanik und des Maschinenbaues, by F. Redtenbacher. Mannheim: Friedrich Bassermann, 1859.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the Deutsches Museum in Munich.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the Deutsches Museum in Munich. Includes selection from article by Carl Reuleaux (Franz Reuleaux's son): "Auch eine Alabamafrage..." Berlin: Carl Beelitz Verlag, 1872. Also includes another Carl Reuleaux piece: "Von der romantischen zur schoenen Maschine" (publication information unclear).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Article that cites Reuleaux and his significance. "Das Mannesmann-Rohr in seiner Bedeutung fuer das Kunstgewerbe." In *Deutsche Bauzeitung,* no 69-70, 29 August and 2 September, 1891 (article split over two issues).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the Deutsches Museum. Has Reuleaux's name handwritten at the top. * "Wann wurde die erste Telegraphenlinie in Deutschland erbaut?" Ein Beitrag zur Geschichte des Telegraphenwesens* by Sautter. Berlin, 1901. Sonder-Abdruck aus dem Archiv fuer Post und Telegraphie.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ads and catalogs selling material influenced by Reuleaux (his name isn't here).

did.unittitle: Reuleaux: Symbol Notation. Expansion of elements

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes on Reuleaux's symbol notation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes, online printouts, correspondence, list of references. Some of it seems is from a the Deutsches Uhrenmuseum.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochures, notes, correspondence on the Deutsches Museum and its collections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes and material from Moon's research trips to the Deutsches Museum in Munich in 2000-2002. Includes notes, a bibliography, a list of digital pictures taken, list of Nachless (collection) numbers and material about the collection from the archive.

did.unittitle: W. Goldsmith, A. Dimarogonas, Moll and Reuleaux

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles by Andrew Dimarogonas and others. Photocopy of work by Moll and Reuleaux: *Constructionslehre fuer den Maschinenbau.* Braunschweig: Friedrich Vieweg und Sohn, 1854; English translation of a few pages. Also includes correspondence with Dimarogonas and Werner Goldsmith.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research done at the American Philosophical Society; photocopies of Reuleaux correspondence (English), notes, catalog records. Research seems to be from 2001; material from 1890-1969

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Translated 2003. Material from Lueders (Wider Herrn Reuleaux!, 1877); Koch (Franz Reuleaux und die Grundung der Mannesmannrehren-Werke, 1969) and others; article on Paris expo. Summaries more than translations. Works 1877-1992.

did.unittitle: DM: lists of models, original letters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes, phtographs, lists, photocopies from the Deutsches Museum. Research done in 2001

did.unittitle: Museums: Sci Museum (London), Musee des Arts et Metiers, Smithsonian.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies, correspondence, notes. Info on collections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Powerpoint slides from a lecture on Reuleaux, in German. Given by a Prof Braune in Hannover, sent to Moon.

did.unittitle: Mechanical Servo Mechanisms History: H.G. Conway

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of two articles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series of blurbs copied from various issues of *American Machinist* that mention Thurston and/or Reuleaux

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In Cassier's magazine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Info on various museums with info on Kinematics

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: About history of Gustav Voigt's home/workshop in Berlin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes from Reuleaux Kinematics book and others (no citations).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of Robert Willis' "Principles of Mechanism: Designed for the use of students in the Universities..." London: John W. Parker.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Misc. articles on Kinematics, technology and machining

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: . Notes, photocopies of pages

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Article from March 21, 1908. "The Mutual Relations of Geometry and Mechanics and Prof. Reuleaux's mechanical Movements."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Herr Geheimer Regierungsrath, Professor Franz Reuleaux und sein Treiben im allgemeinen deutschen Sprachverein" Braunschweig: Johannes Heinrich Meyer: 1893. Photocopy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied article: "Franz Reuleaux uns die Grundlagen seiner Kinematik." Carl Weihe VDI. In *Deutsches Museum: Abhandlungen und Berichte,* 14. Jahrgang, Heft 4.

did.unittitle: Kinematic and Dynamic Analysis of the Sanderson Mechanism -- Draft

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: By Raymond Roberts

did.unittitle: Dubois: Die Schoepfungen Jakob und Alfred Amsler's
Misc German articles on Reuleaux, Riedler et al.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous articles and parts of articles in German on Reuleaux and his contemporaries

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Misc articles, notes and drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a floppy disk

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence with Ing. D. Severin, articles, printed websites. Visited him in Berlin--Reuleaux scholar

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Itineraries, plane tickets

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printouts of Mechanical Engineering Biographies (from ASME).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Article on Reuleaux's Animal Kinematics. "Animal Kinematics--A Review of a Study of Franz Reuleaux about Restrained Animal Motions." By Hanfried Kerle and Manfred Helm. in M Ceccarelli (ed): *International Symposium on History of Machines and Mecahanisms, Proceedings* HMM 2000. 181-186.

did.unittitle: Uncertainties in Kinematic Design. A.F.C. Pollard 1933

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of 1933 article by Pollard. Actually labeled "Kinematic Design in Engineering."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Images and list of documents, printed from online.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes on Zopke's writings on Reuleaux.

did.unittitle: Berlin Biographies: F. Reuleaux, A. Riedler, O. Lilienthal

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A piece on Emil Rathenau

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Dissertation (in German) on Reuleaux by Sebastian Remberger. Title: *Franz Reuleaux: Ansichten und Selbstverstaendnis eines Ingenieurs in der deutschen Gesellschaft des spaeten 19. Jahrhundert.*

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Secondary source articles on Reuleaux and his context, all in German

did.unittitle: Reuleaux research visit, Munich Deutsches Museum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes and research on Voigt and Reuleaux. Includes hand-transcribed letters (Moon's transcriptions) from the Deutsches Museum. Includes Moon's research questions. Moon correspondence, arranging meetings during a research trip in May of 2000.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles by Klaus Mauersberger and others on Reuleaux and technology. Also includes some correspondence with him.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies from a publication called Reuleaux-Mitteilungen, put out by the Reuleaux Gesellschaft

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes and articles on Otto, Langen and the Wankel engine. Also, general notes on European history.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the U. at Karlsruhe. Secondary research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of diagrams from "The Theory of Machines: A Text-book for Engineering Students" by Thomas Bevan. London: Longmans, 1956. pp 144-149. Originally published in 1939.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lookback after his death. Cites Reuleaux's influence on an inventor. From *Frankfurter Algemeine Zeitung,* October 1988.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: articles and diagrams

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: book chapter on Alfred Stieglitz that mentions him studying under Reuleaux.

did.unittitle: Reuleaux Curved Triangle, Rolling in a square

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon's notes, drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Glossaries, hand-made lists of terms

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of book: *The Kinematics of Machinery. Two lectures relating to Reuleaux Methods.* By Alex B.W. Kennedy. Has intro by Thurston.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mix of primary and secondary source articles on Reuleaux, including one by Hans Joachim Braun. Notes. Material on Deutsches Museum collection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Secondary source articles on the history of Kinematics. Articles 1953-1997

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes on Reuleaux, drafts of article on Cornell collection

did.unittitle: Kinematics of Mechanisms from the Time of Watt (Ferguson)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of pp. 185-230. Contributions from the Museum of History and Technology paper 27.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy from *The Enjoyment of Mathematics: Selections from Mathematics for the Amateur* (Princeton: Princeton U Press, 1957). Info on Reuleaux's curvilinear triangle. Also drawings and notes and a brief article. Gathered 2002.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of article from 1876

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Article "Technical Museums and International Exhibitions" by Eugene S. Ferguson. (print-out off internet; not clear where article was published)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of a drawing

did.unittitle: *Von der Bauakademie zur Technischen Universitaet Berlin: Geschichte und Zukunft, 1799-1999*

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: History of the institution at which Reuleaux taught. Relevant information marked with a bookmark. Additional relevant photocopies of articles slipped into the back. Will need to be foldered seperately

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photocopies and transcriptions of original primary source documents created by Reuleaux, such as Reuleaux's correspondence, publications and drawings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of letter from Reuleaux to Thurston.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Typed copies of letters (annotated); also include transcripts by hand, and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Draft of a Moon piece on Reuleaux's letters, coauthored with Moon's his wife, Elizabeth. Consists mostly of the letters themselves, with some commentary and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See above.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy of "The Letterbooks of Franz Reuleaux (1829-1905): A Victorian Engineer." Francis C. Moon and Elizabeth E. Moon.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of Reuleaux letters from the Deutsches Museum. In German, English, French.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon's transcriptions of Reuleaux quotes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Full photocopy of *Die Mascine in der Arbeiterfrage.* F.C.C. Bruns' Verlag, 1885.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy (some pages missing) from Deutsches Museum. In *Verhandlungen des Verein zuer Befoerderung des GewerbefleiBes* 55, 1877, pp. 50-88

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of figures from Reuleaux's *Kinematics of machinery.*

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of articles/lecture on the arts by Reuleaux. (from the Deutsches Museum)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reuleaux lecture: "Ueber den EinfluB der Maschine auf den Gewerbebetrieb" in *Nord und Sued: Eine deutsche Monatsschrift.* Breslau: S. Schottlaender Verlag, 1897. Also from DM

did.unittitle: Reuleaux lecture: Asian art at the Melbourne Exhibition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ueber asiatische Kunst auf der Melbourner Ausstellung. Verein fuer Deutsches Kunstgewerbe zu Berlin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the Deutsches Museum. "Neue Betrachtungen und Versuche ueber die Zapfenreibung." Published in the *Zeitschrift des Vereines deutscher Ingenieure;* vol 35 pg 932. Photocopied article.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied Reuleaux correspondence. Includes some drawings. Probably from Deutsches Museum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reuleaux reports on exhibitions (Paris and Chicago). Plus, photocopies from his quotation book (1852). All from Deutsches Museum.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of selected pages. In Reuleaux's handwriting. From the Deutsches Museum.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Das Bahnercentrik, ein neuer Bewegungsmechanismus." From *Zivilingineur,* Band 4, Heft 1. (n.d.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ueber Neuerungen an Dempfpumpen und Dampfpumpwerken. Lecture before the Verein fuer Eisenbahnkunde, 1886. DM

did.unittitle: Reuleaux lecture: Die Ausstellung in Jekaterinburg

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A lecture about a trip to Russia. Not sure where published. DM.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: *Ueber die Parallelraeder und einege verwandte Mechinismen.* Berlin: G. Hickethier, 1876. DM.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Describes a bunch of figures that aren't included. DM

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Selected pages from Reuleaux's "Ueber die Sperrwerke und ihre Anwendungen." *Vereins zur Befoerderung des Gewerbfleises* 1877. Berlin: Nicolaische Verlags-Buchhandlung, 1877.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Translated article: "On New Features in Teledynamic Transmitters." *School of Mines Quarterly,* vol 8, no 2, 1887. DM

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of Reuleaux notes, drawings, etc. re regulators. Lots of drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy: Otto, H.A. and Eugen Langen. *Atmosphaerische Gaskraftmaschine.* Berlin: 1868. (G. Hickethier pub?) 1-13. Scribbled on front: von F. Reuleaux.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Images of plates of Reuleaux mechanisms. One set labeled as being from "Theoretische Kinematik" (1875).

did.unittitle: Chapter on Geradfuehrungen from Skizzenbuch der Angewandten Kinematik (1880)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: *Geradfuehrungen. In Skizzenbuch der angewandten Kinematik: Eine sammlung von mechanismen nach den Vortraegen des gehimen Regierungsrath Professor Reuleaux.* von den Studiernden der Kgl. technischen Hochschule. Berlin: Verein Huette, 1880.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Images/drawings of mechanisms

did.unittitle: Reuleaux ed: "Einfuehrung in die Geschichte der Erfindungen"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Leipzig u. Berlin: Otto Spamer Verlag. Photocopy includes the forward and pages 523-582, chapters on Watt and the steam engine, and locomotives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of Reuleaux. letters to Thurston. 1880s. Also Reuleaux's lecture notes in German, and Reuleaux's hand drawings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Franz Reuleaux: Kinematik--Aesthetik--Industrie. Konstruktion." 11. Bildnisse beruehmter Konstruktuere.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Dictionary of technical terms. From *Der Fuehrer des Maschinisten by E.F. Scholl,* "besorgt" by Reuleaux. Brauschweig: Friedrich Weiweg und Sohn. Pages 536-548

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies and transcripts of Reuleaux letters to A.D. White. Photocopies of old articles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of primary source material, including examples of Reuleaux's drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of a Reuleaux paper in translation: "Technology and Civilisation" (1890). Photocopies of other Reuleaux primary source material. Also, bibliography of writings on machines. Gathered in '99.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy of translation of Reuleaux: "The influence of the Technical Sciences upon General Culture" (trans Wheaton Kunhardt. From School of Mines Quarterly Vol VII No 1. Oct 1885). Looks like from DM.

did.unittitle: Reuleaux's Die mechanischen Naturkraefte und deren Verwertung.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of piece by Reuleaux. Berlin: Verlag von Hermann Paetel, 1901.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of Reuleaux's *Cultur und Technik.* Wien: Verlag des Niederoesterreichischen Gewerbevereines, Druck von A. Keiss: 1884. Says: Vortrag Gehalten in Niederoesterrichischen Gewerbevereines.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy and some notes. "Lehrbuch der Kinematik von Prof. Dr. F. Reuleaux. Zweiter Band: Die Praktischen Beziehungen der Kinematik zu Geometrie und Mechanik" (Braunschwieg: Friedrich Vieweg und Sohn, 1900).

did.unittitle: Reuleaux: On Style in Machine Design Translation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of Rx's text in German: Ueber den Maschinenbaustil (Braunschweib: Fridrich Veiweg und Sohn, 1862). Summary in English (not a full translation).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of letter (primary source).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes research on Reuleaux's biography and family. Genealogical material includes family trees and information on his ancestors and descendants.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied images of Reuleaux, Reuleaux-related landmarks, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the Fakultaet fuer Maschinenbaue at the Karlsruhe Institute of Technology.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence about a portrait of Reuleaux

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes, correspondence, online material for conversations with Henning Reuleaux and others, including Severin and Remberger.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a printed version of Henning Reuleaux fam history, plus a version on CD. Part 3 is on the Reuleaux family in the 1950's.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes, a family tree narrative (in German), correspondence, photographs of models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos taken on Moon's trip to Berlin. Includes area where Reuleaux used to live, and Reuleaux relatives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reuleaux gave commencement address at Stevens Institute of Technology. This is a brief blurb about it in *Scientific American* (July 29, 1876. Vol XXV p 69).

did.unittitle: Henning Reuleaux letter, re Reuleaux fam

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter (in German) from Dr. Henning Reuleaux, about Reuleaux and his family.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence with Reuleaux's great-granddaughter (American)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and notes re Sylvia Reuleaux Pack's visit to Ithaca.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Family tree for Reuleaux family, Berlin branch. With narrative/history in German. By Christian and Jo Reuleaux.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In da Vinci/Reuleaux book. Photocopied images of Reuleaux, one printed picture. Also includes photocopy of picture of Reuleaux. (One picture has him with his spindle collection).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and an illustration, discussing the location of Rx's house in Berlin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence in German

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: articles, notes on Rx, esp. biography. Gathered 1999-2000

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Info on Marie Reuleaux, list of people with Reuleaux connections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Book and Reuleaux family material

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains information on kinematic models. These include models designed by Reuleaux and others, those housed at Cornell and those dispersed around the world. Also includes material on projects related to models, including the exhibit of Cornell's Reuleaux collection and the KMODDL library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Information about models designed by Reuleaux, especially those housed at other institutions. Reuleaux designated Gustav Voigt and J. Schroeder to manufacture his models, and this subseries contains catalogs of the models Voigt and Schroeder sold. It also includes material on models designed by Reuleux's mentor, Redtenbacher.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Koch's catalog is from 1912 (physical catalog, not copied). Voigt's is mimeographed (1926 for the original?)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Another copy of the Voigt catalogs, 1 and 2nd Verzeichnis

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of drawings of Redtenbacher models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and other documents related to Redtenbacher models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of catalog from 1907. Also includes color images of models (1999-2000)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopied articles on Rx model collections in Dresden. From Dr. FueBl, DM. Original copy from Dr. Mauersberger, Dresden, Oct 2001. From Sammlungen und Kunstbesitz der Technischen Universitaet Dresden

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of old catalog listing of models (German). Correspondence. Material on the Verein deutscher Ingenieure.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of model-maker J. Schroeder's catalog, with illustrations of models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Selected photocopies from Schroeder's 1884 catalog.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of Schroeder's 1884 catalog.

did.unittitle: Bovey, ASME, etc. McGill U. Models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research related to the lost McGill models. Photocopies of McGill course catalog excerpts. Info on Henry T. Bovey.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and notes, trying to track down Rx models that used to be at McGill

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed photographs and other images of Rx models. Also includes some drawings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Info on other Rx model collections. Includes photocopied drawings, articles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of catalog, w/ translation notes in English.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of oversized drawings of Redtenbacher Models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Oversize photocopy of Kinematische Modelle Nach Professor Reuleaux. Also includes an undated original "zweites Verzeichness" of text.

did.unittitle: Das Deutsche Museum: Geschicte, Aufgaben, Zielen

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Book, info on Rx models

did.unittitle: Kinematische Modelle Nach Professor Reuleaux publication

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records pertaining to the Reuleaux models obtained by Cornell president A.D. White in 1882. Includes material on the history of the collection and its use as a teaching tool. Also includes material on the permanent exhibit of the models in Duffield Hall, known as the Reuleaux Collection of Mechanisms and Machines, and designated a National Mechanical Engineering Historic Collection by the American Society of Mechanical Engineers History and Heritage Committee.

did.unittitle: Reuleaux and Leonardo da Vinci Model Drawings by J. Hai

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Drawings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies of old Voigt catalogs. Includes actual book of Voigt models. Inventory of Cornell's collection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon's 1999 report on the Rx collection at Cornell and appendices, including photocopied pages of cards describing the models from the 1940's or 1950's, and including a more current catalog.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs, negatives, photocopies of images of Cornell Models. Also notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correpsondence, notes and lists for the models.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon article on Cornell Rx collection

scopecontent.p: Inventory, notes, catalogs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed images of the old display of Rx models in Sibley

did.unittitle: The Reuleaux Collection of Kinematic Mechanisms at Cornell University, official booklet

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Official booklet to accompany the Reuleaux Model exhibit.

did.unittitle: Cornell Collection of Mechanisms and Machines: Reuleaux Kinematic Models brochure

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brochure that predates the permanent exhibit, although it is undated.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Various brochures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and proposals

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Descriptions of the models in Cornell's collections. Secondary stuff. Also includes notes. Two loose photographs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Misc photocopies about the Rx models at Cornell.

did.unittitle: Use of the RX models at Cornell: Architectural Drawing

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Assignment revolving around the Rx collections, for Architectural Drawing 101

did.unittitle: The Cornell Reuleaux Collection of Mechanisms

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: draft

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes drafts and reports on Cornell's Rx Collection. Also includes photocopies of old cards describing the models, and memoranda. Photocopies of primary source articles.

did.unittitle: Catalog of Rx Models at Cornell University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also includes drafts, notes, etc.

did.unittitle: Harvey N. Roehl: wrote cards on Rx Models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lived 1924-2000. Moon's correspondence with him. Includes copies of his index cards.

did.unittitle: The Cornell Reuleaux Collection of Mechanisms, corrected copy

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Another draft

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Entire magazine included. Blurb begins page 11. About Cornell's Rx models (quotes Moon).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cards and photocopies of cards describing Rx's kinematic models at Cornell.

did.unittitle: School versus Shop: Cornell's Sibley College

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopy of a book chapter by Monte A. Calvert in The Mechanical Engineer in America, 1830-1910. (n.d.) pp 87-105.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photocopies from the Sibley Journal of Engineering (1894); a brochure on Hiram Sibley (1998)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: So cute--fan letters from kids about seeing the Rx collection. Also, materials from a scavenger hunt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inventory and Notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proposals, correspondence, notes, etc., all re Rx models at Cornell.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: [keep folder] Correspondence, notes, drawings, designs etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles, notes, drafts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Drafts, articles, drawings, a CD. Looks like the beginning of what became KMODDL, but I'm not sure

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Draft of Moon speech, articles, fliers, etc. related to the dedication of the Rx exhibit.

did.unittitle: Cornell Collection of Machines and Reuleaux Mechanisms correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records pertaining to the creation of the Kinematic Models for Design Digital Library (KMODDL), an online library about kinematics and kinematic models, created by Moon and his collaborators at other institutions. It includes drafts of tutorials and essays for KMODDL, correspondence, and information regarding the National Science Foundation grant that originally funded the project.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: KMODDL tutorial, written by Moon

did.unittitle: Compound Mechanisms and Gruebler's Mobility Critereon

scopecontent.p: Information on models not designed by Reuleaux. Many of these model collections became a part of the KMODDL project.

scopecontent.p: Drawings of models and material from Suresh G.K. Ananthasuresh

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles about collections of mechanical models at the Musee des arts et metiers, Paris. One in french, one in English. Also includes some misc secondary info on Reuleaux.

did.unittitle: Kinnematik im Tierreiche: articles and Thilo models

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence about Otto Thilo's models based on Reuleaux's Kinnematik im Tierreiche (1909). Also, a secondary article from 1996, and a 1901 article on Reuleaux's K i T.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Kinematic models from Prof. Dietrich in Aachen

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Other models. Includes images.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Images of Schroeder models at the Institute and Museum of the History of Science, Florence. Correspondence w/ Paolo Brenni and others at the museum. Also includes print-outs from the museum's website.

scopecontent.p: Photos and e-mails (photos duplicated elsewhere, but the negatives are here).

did.unittitle: Series III. Moon's papers and professional work

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes drafts and final copies of Moon's academic papers on Reuleaux and others. Also includes relevant materials for Moon's lectures and presentations on Reuleaux.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correpsondence and drafts for Moon's paper: Robert Willis and Franz Reuleaux: Pioneers in the Theory of Medicine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon article in Cornell's ENGINEERING magazine. Magazine itself rather than a draft or typed copy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Paper co-authored by Moon, Hod Lipson, Jimmy Hai, and Carlo Paventi. In the Journal of Mechanical Design, vol 127: Sept 2005 (1029-1033).

did.unittitle: History of Dynamics of Machines and Mechanisms from Leonardo to Timoshenko

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon paper.

did.unittitle: Coexisting chaotic and periodic dynamics in clock escapements

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon paper coauthored with Preston D. Stiefel. *Philosophical Transcriptions of the Royal Society* (2006). 364, 2539-2563. Printed article, plus typed version.

did.unittitle: Elastic Waves and Solid Armature Contact Pressure in Electromagnetic Launchers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Moon paper coauthored with Anthony J. Johnson. *IEEE Transactions on Magnetics,* Vol 42 No 3. March, 2006. Printed version.

did.unittitle: Chaotic Clocks and the Use of History of Machines in Mechanics

did.unittitle: Franz Reuleaux: Contributions of 19th Century kinematics and theory of machines.

did.unittitle: IFToMM Workshop-Lectures: History of Machines and Mechanisms

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a schedule for the conference at Cornell, and a Moon-edited publication of relevant papers. IFToMM stands for International Federation for the Theory of Machanisms and Machines. [OVERSIZE / LEGAL SIZE]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes images of model collections, many of which were for the KMODDL project. They include photographs taken of models at the Deutsches Museum and Karlsruhe, and original slides of images of Cornell's Reuleaux models. Additional formats include CD's, floppy disks, and printouts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: printed in color on glossy paper

scopecontent.p: printed in color on glossy paper

scopecontent.p: printed in color on glossy paper

scopecontent.p: original slides, Moon esp. concerned

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: [set of 6 envelopes with pictures. Also include negatives]. Pictures of models from the Deutsches Museum in Munich.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Just negatives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mixture of DM models and Rx landmarks

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Title further reads London Sci Museum 1876 Int'l Exhibition Rx Models Photos. Cambridge Univ R. Willis Sketches and Drawings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a list on the outside. Seems to include Karlsruhe Models and Hannover Models as well.; Zip Drive Instruction Manual

scopecontent.p: To appear in Applied Mechanics Review, 2003.
